locator_text: Chapter 2, discussion of the Amir Nezam Letgahi family
quoted_text: The Amir Nezam Letgahi family is traced through Abdollah Khan, son of Mostafa Qoli Khan E'temad al-Saltaneh, son of Mohammad Baqer Khan, son of Haji Mohammad Khan Jeyhunabadi; Mohtaj Ali Khan and Mansur Ali Khan are named as his sons.
Letgah is identified as the family's main center, and Kabudarahang as another important landed area.
The user's father belongs under Gholamhossein Khan, not Gholam Ali; Gholam Ali and Gholamhossein are brothers.

locator_text: User visual correction of family-tree figure
quoted_text: Mansur Ali Khan has no descendants shown in the figure.
Abdollah Khan was appointed governor of Khuzestan; Hossein Qoli Khan received Sa'ed al-Saltaneh and Mohtaj Ali Khan received Ejlal al-Mamalek.
Mohtaj Ali Khan Ejlal al-Mamalek Amir Arfa' and Mansur Ali Khan Sardar Akram are identified as sons of Abdollah Khan.
The index lists Mohtaj Ali Khan Ejlal al-Mamalek Amir Arfa' on pages 61 and 152.
